rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the inverted order and redundant statements.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, tightening claims and removing redundancies.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the baseline names and the scope of the 0.71 F1 figure, but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all key issues identified in the original text.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced; the agent identifies and addresses potential overclaims and missing details.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the removal of redundant statements and the reordering of sections.
